nasb.text: You shall take some of the blood of the bull and put it on the horns of the altar with your finger; and you shall pour out all the blood at the base of the altar.

esv.text: and shall take part of the blood of the bull and put it on the horns of the altar with your finger, and the rest of the blood you shall pour out at the base of the altar.

cnv.text: 你要取些公牛的血，用你的指頭抹在祭壇的角上，把其餘的血都倒在祭壇腳前。

ccb.text: 然后，把血带到祭坛那里，用手指把血涂在坛的四个角上，剩下的血倒在坛脚。
